zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Horton於1400年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親William de Horton II28歲，母親Joanne De Dutton26歲。她於1420年與Sir Hamon de Massey在英國英格蘭藍卡爾盧福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1450年在英國藍卡爾盧福德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Horton于1400年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲William de Horton II28岁，母亲Joanne De Dutton26岁。她于1420年与Sir Hamon de Massey在英国英格兰藍卡爾盧福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1450年在英国藍卡爾盧福德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Horton was born in 1400, in Leicestershire, England, her father, William de Horton II, was 28 and her mother, Joanne De Dutton, was 26. She married Sir Hamon de Massey in 1420, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1450, in Rufford, Lancashire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Horton est née en 1400, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Horton II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joanne De Dutton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hamon de Massey en 1420, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1450, à Rufford, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Horton 1400 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Horton II 28 und ihre Mutter Joanne De Dutton 26. Sie hat 1420 in Rufford, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Hamon de Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1450 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Rufford, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Horton è nata il nel 1400 nel Leicestershire, England, sua padre, William de Horton II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joanne De Dutton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hamon de Massey nel 1420, nel Rufford, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1450, nel Rufford, Lancashire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Hortonが1400年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Horton IIは28歳，母Joanne De Duttonは26歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードでSir Hamon de Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアルフォードで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Horton(이)가 1400년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Horton II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanne De Dutton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 Sir Hamon de Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 랭카실르 루퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Horton nasceu em 1400, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Horton II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joanne De Dutton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hamon de Massey em 1420, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1450, em Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Horton родилась в 1400 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Horton II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanne De Dutton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hamon de Massey в 1420 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1450 г. в местности руффорд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Horton nació en 1400, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Horton II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joanne De Dutton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Hamon de Massey en 1420, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1450, en Rufford, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
